name: Pattern Match
description: Find sets of 3 cards with matching patterns

rules.title: How to Play
rules.rule1: Find sets of 3 cards where each property is all same OR all different
rules.rule2: Each card has 4 properties: shape, color, fill, and count
rules.rule3: Select 3 cards that form a valid set

hint: Select 3 cards to check if they form a valid set
